use_cases: Display team members or collaborators in a compact visual group
Show user attribution or participant lists in dashboards
Represent online users or active participants in real-time applications
Display project contributors or task assignees
ai_summary: A smart avatar grouping component that displays multiple user avatars in an organized layout. Supports centered (pyramid-style) and uniform (linear) display variants with configurable sizing, overlap, and ring styling. Features hover interactions with smooth scale animations and integrated tooltips for user information. Built with accessibility in mind using Radix UI primitives.
